Phavercoin

Get ready to claim your Phairdrop and trade $SOCIAL across exchanges.

Step 1

Connect your wallet to start the claiming process

Step 2

Claim your $SOCIAL tokens

Season 2 total size is 200M $SOCIAL (2%) and it is divided among eligible users based on number of Points redeemed times multiplier for $SOCIAL held across Phaver-connected wallets (30-day-average).

Redemption is 1 month after TGE. Read more
